nodes.name: Chop Fest
nodes.description: This is an assessment project I made when I applied to a company. They didn't ask for a complete game loop with win and lose condition so I just made an endless casual game with no restrictions. I completed this game in around 8 hours as I was busy but I do wish I had more time to add more features. I didn't update the game after submission as I want to leave this as a milestone on how much I was able to do in a limited amount of time!
